title: Ghasts Update
description: This mod is inspired by the March 2025 Minecraft Live announcements and add all future ghasts features
body:
## **This mod is inspired by the March 2025 Minecraft Live announcements.**

It adds all the announced features!


# **New Additions**

## **Dried Ghast**

The Dried Ghast is a block found in the Soul Sand Valley. You can collect it and place it in water in the Overworld. During 5 minutes, it will go trough 4 differents undrying phases and then, will transform into a Ghastling.


## **Undry Gamerule**

A new gamerule that define the speed of undrying, it start at 10, the higher it is, the faster dried ghast will undry !
/gamerule undry [value]


## **Ghastling**

The Ghastling is a new, smaller, and cuter version of a Ghast. You can feed it snowballs to help it grow into a Happy Ghast.


## **Happy Ghast**

The Happy Ghast is... well, a happy Ghast—pretty obvious, right?

_You can open its inventory with sneak + right click !_

By giving it a ghast saddle, you and up to three other players can mount it and fly around the world!
Additionally, you can use it as a floating platform—when dismounting, you'll stand on it and be able to walk in the air!


## **Ghast Saddle**

Can be crafted with 3 leather, 2 glasses and 1 blue wool ! (See Gallery)


 

⚠ Disclaimer: This is not an official mod. Feel free to share your feedback, and let me know if you encounter any bugs or issues!
